required_preferences.fact: Replaces biweekly video calls with frequent in-person conversations and activities while her sister stays at her home — no longer keeps scheduled virtual appointments

supersedes.fact: Keeps biweekly video calls with her sister as standing appointments — never reschedules more than 24 hours in advance

required_preferences.fact: Keeps her phone on ‘Do Not Disturb’ during dinner, but now sometimes answers urgent work calls after 6pm if critical office issues arise

supersedes.fact: Keeps her phone on ‘Do Not Disturb’ during dinner hours — never answers work calls after 6pm

required_preferences.fact: Plans weekly shared dinners with her sister, either cooking together or trying new local restaurants, to support her sister’s transition and build connection
Completes all household chores before 8pm so evenings are free for family time — never leaves chores for the weekend
Batch grocery shops on Sundays for the week — never shops on weekdays unless absolutely necessary
Prioritizes one-on-one mentoring sessions with junior staff — never cancels these for urgent sales meetings

persona: A mid-career e-commerce manager at a multinational retail company
